stemHtml: On the navigation display (ND) of an EFIS equipped aircraft, the colours used are…

options.a: amber or white for the active waypoint (TO waypoint), yellow for high precipitation.
options.b: magenta or white for the active waypoint (TO waypoint), green for light precipitation.
options.c: magenta or red for the active waypoint (TO waypoint), amber for medium precipitation.
options.d: white or blue for the active waypoint (TO waypoint), red for medium precipitation.
